claims.statement: Great Barrier Reef length is at least 6× larger than Channel Tunnel length.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Great Barrier Reef length: 2300 km. Channel Tunnel length: 50.45 km.

claims.statement: Elite sprinter top speed (approx.) is faster than Category 5 hurricane threshold.
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Elite sprinter top speed (approx.): 45 km/h. Category 5 hurricane threshold: 252 km/h.

claims.statement: Panama Canal length is shorter than Appalachian Trail length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Panama Canal length: 82 km. Appalachian Trail length: 3500 km.

claims.statement: There are fewer grams in a kilogram than UN member states.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 1,000 g vs 193 states.

claims.statement: First iPhone released happened before Penicillin discovered.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. First iPhone released: 2007. Penicillin discovered: 1928.
